case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. AMADO CONCEPCION MAAY HAU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAAY HAU, AMADO CONCEPCION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-12-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AMADO CONCEPCION MAAY HAU. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO 7/12/2024 AT 1:30PM

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: PER CURRENT RESIDENT, RESPONDENT NO LONGER LIVES AT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAAY HAU, AMADO CONCEPCION
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT AMADO CONCEPCION MAAY HAU IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
